# Test fixture for OUI/manuf parsing
# Format: PREFIX[/MASK]<TAB>ShortName<TAB>LongName

# 3-byte prefix
00:00:0C	Cisco	Cisco Systems, Inc.

# 4-byte prefix
00:1B:63:84	Apple4	Apple Inc. (4-byte)

# 5-byte prefix
00:1B:63:84:E0	Apple5	Apple, Inc.

# Comment line should be skipped
# Blank lines below should be skipped

00:50:56	VMware	VMware, Inc.

# Malformed line — should be gracefully skipped
not-a-valid-prefix	Bad	Bad Vendor
